title: CobbleZero
description:
🌟 CobbleZero Modpack Summary

CobbleZero is a custom Cobblemon adventure built for trainers who want more than just catching Pokémon. With gyms, NPC opponents, Mega Evolutions, and QoL mods, it’s the perfect blend of survival Minecraft and a true Pokémon
body:
🌟 CobbleZero Showcase Layout

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9189049108553be7b8e9d477ac93f73afa04ffa6.gif)

Hello there! Welcome to the world of Cobblemon!
My name is Professor Legend and I’ll be your guide to CobbleZero <3

⚡ Server Features

🎁 Begin your adventure with a Shiny Starter, Pokédex, and backpack.

🐾 Explore the world by riding, flying, and surfing with your Pokémon.

⚔️ Take on custom-built Gyms and rise through the ranks to become the Champion of CobbleZero.

🌌 Discover legendary Pokémon events and capture rare spawns.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Battle NPC Trainers with Cobblemon Opponents.

💥 Unlock the power of Mega Evolution with Cobblemon Mega Showdown.

🏆 Earn rewards, crate keys, and ranks by voting and being active.

🏠 Build your sanctuary with land claims and protect your creations.

🔊 Use voice chat to connect with friends and allies while you play.




🔧 QoL Mods on CobbleZero

Cobblemon – Catch, train, and battle Pokémon in Minecraft.

Cobblemon Opponents – NPC trainers bring the world to life.

Cobblemon Mega Showdown – Mega Evolutions in action.

Rad Gyms [Cobblemon] – Gyms with leaders to challenge.

SimpleTMs – Teach your Pokémon moves with TMs.

Xaero’s Minimap & World Map – Explore and never get lost.

JEI (Just Enough Items) – Search recipes and items easily.

Shulker Box Tooltip – Check storage contents instantly.

Voice Chat – Talk directly with other trainers.

Trinkets – Extra slots for curios and items.
